docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-08-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, TONY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TONY LEE'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS DURING THE PENDENCY OF ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. Notice Of Motion To Stay Proceedings During The Pendency Of Arbitration; Pos
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF TONY LEE's Motion To Stay Proceedings During The Pendency Of Arbitration is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
